LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANTS ALLAN SCHWARTZ AND JUDITH SLOTSKY'S DEMURRER TO ALL FOUR CLAIMS IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. ALL FOUR CLAIMS ARE ADEQUATELY PLED AND IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED FROM THE FACE OF THE CROSS-COMPLAINT THAT ANY OF THOSE CLAIMS ARE BARRED DUE TO THE ASSERTION THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANT R & R PLUMBING LACKED A REQUIRED LICENSE. CROSS-DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED BECAUSE THE COURT MAY NOT DETERMINE THE LEGAL EFFECT OF THE DOCUMENTS SOUGHT TO BE JUDICIALLY NOTICED ON A DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Off Calendar May-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Allan Schwartz of Law Office of Allan J. Schwartz telephone number 415-956-0712 for Cross-Defendants Allan Schwartz and Judith Slotsky.
Ashley Hongisto of Law Office of Michael B. Carroll for Cross-Complainant R & R Plumbing Group, Inc.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANTS ALLAN SCHWARTZ and JUDITH SLOTSKY'S DEMURRER to all four claims in the cross-complaint is overruled in its entirety. All four claims are adequately pled and it cannot be determined from the face of the cross-complaint that any of those claims are barred due to the assertion that Cross-Complainant R & R Plumbing lacked a required license. Cross-Defendants' request for judicial notice is denied because the court may not determine the legal effect of the documents sought to be judicially noticed on a demurrer. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
